title: Nmap Quick Start
when_to_use: During active reconnaissance and enumeration phases

steps.title: Basic Scan
steps.tip: Default scan checks the 1000 most common ports. Good for quick initial assessment

steps.title: Service Detection
steps.tip: -sV probes open ports to determine service version. Essential for vulnerability research

steps.title: OS Detection
steps.tip: Requires root/sudo. May not always be accurate. Use alongside service banners for confirmation

steps.title: Default Scripts
steps.tip: -sC runs default NSE scripts which can reveal additional info like SSL certs, HTTP titles, and DNS names

steps.title: Combined Scan
steps.tip: This is the 'gold standard' initial scan. Add -p- for all ports on important targets

steps.title: Save Output
steps.tip: Also use -oX for XML (importable into other tools) and -oA for all formats simultaneously

steps.title: Authorisation Check
steps.instruction: Always verify you have authorisation before scanning
steps.tip: This is not optional. Scanning without authorisation is illegal. Always confirm scope before every scan
